questions.question: Describe the main difference between a data flow diagram and a behavioural state machine. Provide a suitable example to illustrate your answer.
What is the purpose of a modelling language (e.g. SDL) in the development of digital systems? Compare and contrast SDL with a data flow diagram.
Explain the concept of 'state transitions' in a behavioural model. Provide an example of a simple finite state machine (FSM) and describe how it can be used to model a digital circuit.
